'''âdh-ng-j''' ('''kadhangaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coedit|coedit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coedit|coedit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-ng-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadhangaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhangaj|thidhangaj]] || [[word:jidhangaj|jidhangaj]] || [[word:shidhangaj|shidhangaj]] || [[word:kidhangaj|kidhangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhangaj|thuthudhangaj]] || [[word:jujudhangaj|jujudhangaj]] || [[word:shushudhangaj|shushudhangaj]] || [[word:kukudhangaj|kukudhangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhangaj|thudhangaj]] || [[word:judhangaj|judhangaj]] || [[word:shudhangaj|shudhangaj]] || [[word:kudhangaj|kudhangaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhangaj|thudhangaj]] || [[word:judhangaj|judhangaj]] || [[word:shudhangaj|shudhangaj]] || [[word:kudhangaj|kudhangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhangaj|thedhangaj]] || [[word:jedhangaj|jedhangaj]] || [[word:shedhangaj|shedhangaj]] || [[word:kedhangaj|kedhangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhangaj|thothodhangaj]] || [[word:jojodhangaj|jojodhangaj]] || [[word:shoshodhangaj|shoshodhangaj]] || [[word:kokodhangaj|kokodhangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhangaj|thodhangaj]] || [[word:jodhangaj|jodhangaj]] || [[word:shodhangaj|shodhangaj]] || [[word:kodhangaj|kodhangaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhangaj|thodhangaj]] || [[word:jodhangaj|jodhangaj]] || [[word:shodhangaj|shodhangaj]] || [[word:kodhangaj|kodhangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhangaj|thĂŠdhangaj]] || [[word:jĂŠdhangaj|jĂŠdhangaj]] || [[word:shĂŠdhangaj|shĂŠdhangaj]] || [[word:kĂŠdhangaj|kĂŠdhangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhangaj|thathadhangaj]] || [[word:jajadhangaj|jajadhangaj]] || [[word:shashadhangaj|shashadhangaj]] || [[word:kakadhangaj|kakadhangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhangaj|thadhangaj]] || [[word:jadhangaj|jadhangaj]] || [[word:shadhangaj|shadhangaj]] || [[word:kadhangaj|kadhangaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhangaj|thadhangaj]] || [[word:jadhangaj|jadhangaj]] || [[word:shadhangaj|shadhangaj]] || [[word:kadhangaj|kadhangaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhangaj|shadhangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhangaj|goshadhangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhangaj|gokishadhangaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhangajnĂŒ|shadhangajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhangajnknĂŒ|goshadhangajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhangajnĂŒ|gokishadhangajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhangajshĂ«|shadhangajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkshĂ«|goshadhangajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhangajshĂ«|gokishadhangajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhangajro|shadhangajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkro|goshadhangajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhangajro|gokishadhangajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhangajmu|shadhangajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkmu|goshadhangajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhangajmu|gokishadhangajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhangajsher|shadhangajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhangajnksher|goshadhangajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhangajsher|gokishadhangajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhangajng|shadhangajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkng|goshadhangajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhangajng|gokishadhangajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhangajya|shadhangajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkya|goshadhangajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhangajya|gokishadhangajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhangajyam|shadhangajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkyam|goshadhangajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhangajyam|gokishadhangajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhangajnĂŒshĂ«|shadhangajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhangajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhangajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhangajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhangajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhangajnĂŒro|shadhangajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhangajnknĂŒro|goshadhangajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhangajnĂŒro|gokishadhangajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhangajnĂŒmu|shadhangajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhangajnknĂŒmu|goshadhangajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhangajnĂŒmu|gokishadhangajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhangajshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhangajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhangajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhangajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhangajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhangajshĂ«ro|shadhangajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkshĂ«ro|goshadhangajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhangajshĂ«ro|gokishadhangajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhangajshĂ«mu|shadhangajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkshĂ«mu|goshadhangajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhangajshĂ«mu|gokishadhangajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhangajronĂŒ|shadhangajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkronĂŒ|goshadhangajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhangajronĂŒ|gokishadhangajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhangajroshĂ«|shadhangajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkroshĂ«|goshadhangajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhangajroshĂ«|gokishadhangajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhangajromu|shadhangajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkromu|goshadhangajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhangajromu|gokishadhangajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhangajmunĂŒ|shadhangajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkmunĂŒ|goshadhangajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhangajmunĂŒ|gokishadhangajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhangajmushĂ«|shadhangajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkmushĂ«|goshadhangajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhangajmushĂ«|gokishadhangajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhangajmuro|shadhangajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhangajnkmuro|goshadhangajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhangajmuro|gokishadhangajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
